title: auth pkg support emtpy argument & enable login test
body:
import auth pkg to support empty login argument and enable login_logout tests
import c/common auth pkg PR https://github.com/containers/common/pull/135
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: We need to squash the commits. Each commit must compile (and ideally pass tests). The reasoning behind is to avoid expensive noise when bisecting issues.

LGTM
Squash commits and then we can merge.
